query:
-- Move messages from duplicate dialogs to the main dialog #2
UPDATE messages SET dialogId = 2 WHERE dialogId IN (30001, 30002);

-- Update dialog #2 with the latest message info
UPDATE dialogs SET 
  status = 'open',
  lastMessageText = 'привет',
  lastMessageAt = (SELECT MAX(createdAt) FROM messages WHERE dialogId = 2),
  unreadCount = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE dialogId = 2 AND isRead = 0)
WHERE id = 2;

-- Delete the duplicate dialogs
DELETE FROM dialogs WHERE id IN (30001, 30002);
